page_content:
ARTH689 Selected Topics in Art History (1-3 Credits) Repeatable to: 9 credits.

ARTH496 Methods of Art History and Archaeology (3 Credits) Methods of research and criticism applied to typical art-historical/ archaeological problems, familiarizing the student with bibliography and other research tools. Introduction to the historiography of art history and archaeology, surveying the principal theories, encouraging methodological debates within the discipline. Course for majors who intend to go on to graduate school. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art History & Archaeology department. Restriction: Must be in Art History program.

ARTH498 Directed Studies in Art History I (2-3 Credits) Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art History & Archaeology department. Restriction: Junior standing or higher. Repeatable to: 99 credits if content differs.

ARTH499 Honors Thesis (1-6 Credits) Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art History & Archaeology department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

ARTH692 Methods of Art History (3 Credits) Methods of research and criticism applied to typical art-historical problems; bibliography and other research tools.
